title: Diodonta aurea
taxonomy: Diodonta aurea is a species of sea snail in the family Cardiidae, which are also known as cockle snails or heart cockles. This classification falls under the phylum Mollusca, which is a group of invertebrates that also includes oysters, squids, and clams. The class Gastropoda is another level of classification for Diodonta aurea, which includes snails and slugs. Diodonta aurea is further classified as a genus within the family Cardiidae. The exact classification of Diodonta aurea is Diodonta aurea (E. A. Smith, 1880).
